evidence_id.description: Unique cryptographic transaction identifier for this specific validation execution.

textbook_id.description: Unique identifier of the verified textbook authority.

edition.description: The specific edition/year of the verified textbook.

chapter.description: The title of the originating chapter.

section.description: The title of the originating section.

page_numbers.description: The exact page numbers where the concept or exercise resides.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the page content from the page registry.

retrieval_hash.description: SHA-256 hash representing the query retrieval state from the database.

lineage_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the full lineage trace of the response.

verification_status.description: The verification classification of the source material.
